issue: Duplicate export of CarouselApi - exported as both value and type
fix: Removed CarouselApi from regular exports, kept only type export
before:
export { Carousel, CarouselApi, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious };
export type { CarouselApi };
after:
export { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious };
export type { CarouselApi };
rationale: Type-only exports must use 'export type' with isolatedModules enabled. Duplicate identifier caused TS2300 error.

issue: toHaveText() called without argument - Playwright 1.58+ requires argument
fix: Changed to toBeVisible() to verify element exists
rationale: toHaveText() requires an argument in Playwright 1.58+. Using toBeVisible() which is more appropriate for existence check.

fix: Removed try/catch since it just rethrows the error
rationale: The try/catch added no value since it just rethrew the error. Removing it simplifies the code.
